{{- $page := .Page -}} {{- $buildConfig := site.Params.build | default dict -}} {{- $copyDefaults := dict "intro" "This fallback changelog is generated by the theme. Replace this page in your site content when you want curated release notes." "current_build" "Current build" "build_version" "Build version" "build_time" "Build time" "git_commit" "Git commit" "page_source_revision" "Page source commit" "theme_source" "Theme source" "release_notes" "Release notes" "release_notes_fallback" "Curated release notes are not maintained here yet. For now, this page confirms the deployed build and the source information available at build time." "theme_repo" "https://github.com/swawai/hugo-theme-banyan" -}} {{- $copy := merge $copyDefaults ($page.Params.changelog | default dict) -}} {{- $themeRepo := trim (printf "%v" (index $copy "theme_repo" | default (site.Params.theme_repo | default "https://github.com/swawai/hugo-theme-banyan"))) " \r\n\t" -}} {{- $buildCommit := index $buildConfig "commit" | default dict -}} {{- $buildRevision := trim (printf "%v" (index $buildConfig "revision" | default "")) " \r\n\t" -}} {{- $buildCommitShort := trim (printf "%v" (index $buildCommit "short" | default "")) " \r\n\t" -}} {{- $buildCommitHref := trim (printf "%v" (index $buildCommit "href" | default (index $buildConfig "revision_href" | default ""))) " \r\n\t" -}} {{- $buildCommitDisplay := $buildRevision -}} {{- if $buildCommitShort -}} {{- $buildCommitDisplay = $buildCommitShort -}} {{- else if gt (len $buildRevision) 12 -}} {{- $buildCommitDisplay = substr $buildRevision 0 12 -}} {{- end -}} {{- $buildVersion := partial "build-version.html" $page -}} {{- $buildTimeISO := partial "build-time-iso.html" $page -}} {{- $buildTimeDisplay := partial "build-time-display.html" $page -}}

{{ index $copy "intro" }}

{{ index $copy "current_build" }}

  • {{ index $copy "build_version" }}: {{ $buildVersion }}
  • {{ index $copy "build_time" }}: {{ $buildTimeDisplay }}
    • {{- if $buildCommitDisplay }}
  • {{ index $copy "git_commit" }}: {{ if $buildCommitHref }}{{ $buildCommitDisplay }}{{ else }}{{ $buildCommitDisplay }}{{ end }}
    • {{- end }} {{- with $page.GitInfo }}
  • {{ index $copy "page_source_revision" }}: {{ .AbbreviatedHash }}{{ with .CommitDate }} - {{ .Format "2006-01-02 15:04" }}{{ end }}{{ with .Subject }} - {{ . }}{{ end }}
    • {{- end }} {{- if $themeRepo }}
  • {{ index $copy "theme_source" }}: {{ $themeRepo }}
    • {{- end }}

{{ index $copy "release_notes" }}

{{ index $copy "release_notes_fallback" }}
